aboutPreview.title: About the Holy Shrine
aboutPreview.p1: The Shrine of Imams Ali al-Hadi and Hasan al-Askari (Peace Be Upon Them) in the city of Samarra is one of the holiest Islamic shrines in the world. The shrine is distinguished by its famous golden dome, which is a symbol of the holy city.
aboutPreview.p2: The Al-Askari Holy Shrine strives to provide the best services to visitors, including food, accommodation, and various educational and cultural programs.

success.hadith: Whoever gives charity shall have a reward equal to the one who acted upon it

about.historyP1: The Shrine of Imams Ali al-Hadi and Hasan al-Askari (Peace Be Upon Them) is located in the holy city of Samarra, and is one of the holiest Islamic shrines in the world. The shrine houses the remains of the 10th Imam Ali al-Hadi and the 11th Imam Hasan al-Askari.
about.historyP2: The shrine was built in 944 CE, and is distinguished by its famous golden dome, which was covered with 72,000 gold pieces in 1905, making it a prominent symbol of the holy city of Samarra and a global Islamic landmark.
about.historyP3: The shrine also houses the tomb of Lady Hakima Khatun (sister of Imam Ali al-Hadi) and Lady Narjis Khatun (mother of Imam Muhammad al-Mahdi, may Allah hasten his reappearance).
about.reconstructionP1: The holy shrine was subjected to two terrorist bombings in 2006 and 2007, which destroyed the golden dome and two historic minarets. This heinous attack shook the feelings of Muslims around the world.
about.reconstructionP2: Reconstruction efforts began in 2009 with support from the Iraqi government, UNESCO, the United Nations Development Programme, and the Committee for the Reconstruction of Holy Shrines, under the guidance of Grand Ayatollah Sayyid Ali al-Sistani.
about.reconstructionP3: The golden dome and minarets were rebuilt in their full glory, and the Holy Shrine continues ongoing maintenance and development efforts to serve visitors.

about.donationsText: Your generous donations help sustain services for visitors including food, accommodation, and care, as well as the reconstruction and maintenance of the Holy Shrine, support for educational and cultural programs, and sponsorship of orphans and those in need.

footer.about: Shrine of Imams Ali al-Hadi and Hasan al-Askari (Peace Be Upon Them) in the holy city of Samarra. We strive to serve visitors and reconstruct the Holy Shrine.
